title: Campaigns | Daniel Francis MP
text_excerpt: Campaigns | Daniel Francis MP Find me on Facebook 0207 219 5278 HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS NEWSLETTERS USEFUL LINKS Useful Links Advice & Support Legislative Update: Key Government Bills HELP Contact Visit Parliament Event Request CAMPAIGNS Click on the links below to find out more about local campaigns to make our local area a fairer and safer place for all. Facebook X-twitter Instagram Envelope COMMUNITY CENTRES local campaign Local families have lost a vital hub since Parkside Community Centre was knocked down by the council. We cannot let this space be lost forever. Complete my survey today, I want to hear from local residents about the future of Parkside Community Centre. Details SLADE GREEN LIGHTS local campaign Residents have reported feeling unsafe using the bridge after dark on the footbridge at Slade Green. Your local MP has been working with Slade Green & Northend ward councillors to get Network Rail to reinstate lighting on Slade Green’s footbridge after its wrongful removal. Details POTHOLE PATROL local campaign The Pothole Patrol campaign started in the summer of 2025, and ended up going all the way to Westminster. Every road in the constituency was checked and all potholes were measured and reported to the council. Resulting in increased spend of the council's road resurfacing budget. Details GET IN TOUCH As your local MP there are a number of different things I can help you with or offer advice on, such as; benefits, immigration, tax issues, problems with the NHS, child maintenance and education matters. I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP for Bexleyheath and Crayford and what matters most to you. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. 0207 219 5278 daniel.francis.mp@parliament.uk Contact (Footer) Subscribe Full Name Email Phone/Mobile Address Message I have read & agree to the Privacy Policy (Required) Sign up to campaign updates Sign me up for email updates with news & campaign developments. Submit Social Network Get Involved Please use the contact form here to get in touch with me and find out more about my campaigns, priorities and how to get involved. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your full contact details.
